flat.content: When no `tcell_selector` specified, a k-means clustering is done with `n=2` using the expressions of indicator genes for each cluster. Then the mean expression of CD3E is calculated for each kmeans cluster and the cluster with the highest mean expression is selected, in which the Seurat clusters are assigned as T cells.

The data that is used to determine the T-cell clusters, including the gene expression values for indicator genes. The cluster size and the final determined T-cell flags. The expression values are normalized with mean 0 and standard deviation 1.

Scatter plots showing the average gene expression against expression of CD3E for each cluster. The x-axis is the expression of CD3E The y-axis is the average gene expression of the given gene. The expression values are normalized with mean 0 and standard deviation 1.

table_of_images.name: T cells in pie charts
table_of_images.desc: The number and percentage of T cells and other cells in pie charts

table_of_images.name: T cells in each sample
table_of_images.desc: Absolute number of T cells and other cells in each sample (left) and percentage of T cells and other cells in each sample (right).
